name: ChatGPT
description: OpenAI's flagship conversational AI. Handles writing, analysis, coding, and creative tasks. The gold standard for general-purpose AI chat.

name: Claude
description: Anthropic's AI assistant. Excels at nuanced writing, long document analysis, and thoughtful reasoning. Known for being more careful and less prone to hallucination.

name: Google Gemini
description: Google's AI assistant with deep integration into Google Workspace. Best for users already in the Google ecosystem who want AI-powered productivity.

name: Perplexity AI
description: AI-powered search engine that cites its sources. The best tool for research where you need verified, sourced answers rather than generated text.
cons: Can over-rely on top search results

name: Microsoft Copilot
description: Microsoft's AI assistant built on GPT-4. Best value for Microsoft 365 users who want AI across Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and Teams.

name: Poe
description: Quora's multi-model AI platform. Access ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and dozens of other models from one interface. Great for comparing models side-by-side.
pros: Access many models in one place

name: GitHub Copilot
description: AI pair programmer that lives in your IDE. Autocompletes code, generates functions from comments, and understands your codebase context. The must-have tool for developers.

name: Cursor
description: AI-first code editor built on VS Code. Goes beyond autocomplete — it can refactor entire files, explain codebases, and generate features from descriptions.
cons: VS Code fork may lag behind
Pro plan needed for heavy use
Can be slow on large projects

name: Replit
description: Cloud-based IDE with AI agent that can build entire apps from descriptions. Best for prototyping and learning — you can go from idea to deployed app in minutes.

name: v0 by Vercel
description: AI UI generator that creates React components from text or image descriptions. Generates production-ready code with Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui components.

name: Bolt.new
description: AI full-stack app builder. Describe what you want and it generates a complete working application with frontend, backend, and deployment. Impressive for MVPs.

name: Codeium (Windsurf)
description: Free AI code completion that rivals GitHub Copilot. Now rebranded as Windsurf with an AI-native editor. Best free option for individual developers.

name: Tabnine
description: AI code assistant focused on privacy and enterprise. Can run locally and train on your codebase. Good choice for companies with strict data policies.

name: Lovable
description: AI app builder focused on beautiful, production-ready web apps. Generates clean React code with authentication, databases, and deployment built in.

name: Midjourney
description: The gold standard for AI image generation. Produces stunning, artistic images with minimal prompting. Best for creative and marketing visuals.

name: DALL-E 3
description: OpenAI's image generator, integrated into ChatGPT. Best for users who want image generation alongside conversation — describe what you want and iterate naturally.

name: Stable Diffusion
description: Open-source image generation you can run locally. Maximum control and customization through fine-tuning, LoRAs, and community models. The power user's choice.

name: Ideogram
description: AI image generator that excels at text rendering and logo-style graphics. Best for designers who need text-heavy visuals, logos, and typography-focused designs.

name: Leonardo.ai
description: AI image platform built for game assets, marketing visuals, and creative production. Strong fine-tuning capabilities and a growing library of community models.

name: Canva AI
description: AI features built into the world's most popular design tool. Magic Studio includes text-to-image, background removal, resizing, and brand kit management.

name: Adobe Firefly
description: Adobe's AI image generator, integrated into Photoshop and the Creative Cloud. Commercially safe — trained only on licensed content. Best for professional designers.
pricing: Free tier / Included with Creative Cloud ($54.99/mo)
cons: Expensive if not already on CC

name: Flux
description: Next-gen open-source image model from Black Forest Labs (ex-Stability AI team). Rivals Midjourney quality with open weights. The new king of open-source image gen.

name: Runway
description: The leading AI video generation platform. Gen-2 and Gen-3 create impressive video from text or images. Used by professional filmmakers and content creators.

name: Sora
description: OpenAI's video generation model. Produces remarkably realistic video from text descriptions. Currently the most hyped AI video tool, though access is still limited.

name: ElevenLabs
description: The best AI voice generator. Clone voices, generate natural speech in 30+ languages, and create audiobooks. Quality is nearly indistinguishable from human speech.

name: Descript
description: AI-powered video and podcast editor. Edit video by editing text — it's like a Google Doc for video. Includes filler word removal, eye contact correction, and voice cloning.
cons: Can be slow with long videos

name: HeyGen
description: AI avatar video platform. Create professional talking-head videos with AI avatars — no camera needed. Popular for training, marketing, and multilingual content.

name: Synthesia
description: Enterprise AI video creation platform. Create training videos, explainers, and marketing content with AI avatars. Used by Fortune 500 companies for internal comms.

name: Suno
description: AI music generator that creates full songs from text descriptions. Generates vocals, instruments, and lyrics. Impressively good for a technology that barely existed a year ago.

name: Udio
description: AI music generation that rivals Suno. Known for higher fidelity output and better vocal quality. Good for anyone who needs custom music without hiring musicians.

name: Luma Dream Machine
description: AI video generation that's fast and free to try. Creates short video clips from text or images. A solid Runway alternative with a more accessible pricing model.

name: Jasper
description: AI writing platform built for marketing teams. Brand voice training, campaign workflows, and template library. The enterprise choice for marketing content at scale.
cons: ChatGPT can do most of this

name: Copy.ai
description: AI copywriting tool focused on sales and marketing copy. Good for generating ad copy, email sequences, and social media posts. Simpler and cheaper than Jasper.

name: Grammarly
description: AI writing assistant for grammar, tone, and clarity. Now includes generative AI features. Essential for anyone who writes professionally and wants consistent quality.

name: Notion AI
description: AI built into Notion's workspace. Summarize docs, generate content, fill databases, and answer questions about your workspace. Best for existing Notion users.
cons: Only useful if you use Notion

name: Writesonic
description: AI writing and SEO platform. Generates blog posts, landing pages, and ads with built-in SEO optimization. Also includes Chatsonic, their ChatGPT alternative.
pricing: Free tier / Individual $16/mo / Team $13/mo per seat
cons: Quality can be hit or miss

name: Sudowrite
description: AI writing tool designed specifically for fiction writers. Helps with plot development, character creation, world-building, and prose improvement. The novelist's AI companion.

name: Surfer SEO
description: AI-powered SEO content optimization. Analyzes top-ranking content and tells you exactly how to structure your articles. Pairs AI writing with data-driven SEO strategy.

name: Wordtune
description: AI rewriting tool that helps you say the same thing better. Offers casual, formal, shorter, and longer rewrites. Great for non-native English writers.

name: Otter.ai
description: AI meeting transcription and note-taking. Joins your meetings automatically, transcribes in real-time, and generates summaries with action items. A meeting productivity essential.

name: Zapier
description: The OG automation platform, now with AI features. Connect 6,000+ apps with no code. AI features include natural language automation building, AI-powered data processing.

name: Make (Integromat)
description: Visual automation platform. More powerful and flexible than Zapier for complex workflows, with a visual builder that shows data flow. Great for power users.

name: n8n
description: Open-source workflow automation you can self-host. Full control over your data and workflows. The developer's choice for automation with AI integrations.

name: Reclaim.ai
description: AI calendar assistant that automatically schedules your tasks, habits, and meetings. Finds optimal times and protects focus time. The best AI calendar tool available.

name: Bardeen
description: AI browser automation. Scrape data, automate repetitive browser tasks, and build workflows triggered by web page changes. Like a smart browser macro on steroids.

name: Raycast
description: Mac launcher with AI built in. Replace Spotlight with a tool that has AI chat, snippets, clipboard history, and app integrations. The Mac power user's best friend.

name: Motion
description: AI project management that automatically schedules your tasks. Combines calendar, task manager, and project management. Auto-prioritizes and reschedules as things change.

name: Gamma
description: AI presentation and document builder. Create beautiful decks, docs, and webpages from text prompts. The best AI alternative to PowerPoint for quick, attractive presentations.

name: Tableau AI
description: AI features in Tableau including natural language queries, automated insights, and predictive analytics. Best for existing Tableau users who want AI-powered data exploration.

name: Julius AI
description: AI data analyst you chat with. Upload spreadsheets, databases, or connect data sources and ask questions in plain English. Great for non-technical data analysis.

name: Rows
description: AI-powered spreadsheet that combines the familiarity of Excel with AI capabilities. Chat with your data, generate formulas, and create dashboards from spreadsheets.
cons: Less powerful than real BI tools

name: Hex
description: Collaborative data workspace with AI. Combines SQL, Python, and no-code in one platform. AI helps write queries, explain results, and build visualizations.

name: Obviously AI
description: No-code predictive analytics. Upload a CSV, pick what you want to predict, and get a machine learning model in minutes. Democratizes ML for business users.

name: Akkio
description: No-code AI for business analytics and predictions. Built for agencies and SMBs who want predictive analytics without data science teams.

name: Databricks AI
description: Enterprise data intelligence platform with AI/ML capabilities. The choice for large organizations doing serious data science, analytics, and ML at scale.

name: Notably AI
description: AI research analysis platform. Helps researchers synthesize qualitative data from interviews, surveys, and documents. Great for UX research and market research teams.

name: HubSpot AI
description: AI features across HubSpot's CRM, marketing, and sales platform. Content generation, predictive lead scoring, and chatbot builder. Best for existing HubSpot users.

name: Apollo.io
description: AI-powered sales intelligence and outreach platform. Find leads, enrich contacts, and automate email sequences. The best all-in-one prospecting tool with AI.

name: Clay
description: AI data enrichment and outreach platform. Pull data from 50+ sources to build hyper-personalized outbound campaigns. The secret weapon of top sales teams.

name: Lavender
description: AI email coach that scores your sales emails and suggests improvements in real-time. Helps you write emails that actually get replies. Data-driven cold email optimization.
pricing: Free tier / Starter $29/mo / Individual Pro $49/mo / Team custom

name: Salesloft (Drift)
description: AI-powered conversational marketing platform. Chatbots that qualify leads, book meetings, and engage website visitors. Now part of Salesloft's revenue platform.

name: Mutiny
description: AI website personalization for B2B. Shows different content to different visitors based on their company, industry, and intent. Impressive conversion lift potential.

name: Gong
description: AI revenue intelligence platform. Records and analyzes sales calls to identify winning patterns, coach reps, and forecast deals. The standard for conversation intelligence.

name: Instantly
description: AI cold email platform. Unlimited email accounts, warmup, and AI-powered campaign optimization. The go-to tool for high-volume cold outreach.

name: Fireflies.ai
description: AI meeting recorder and transcription for sales teams. Captures calls, generates summaries, and pushes notes to your CRM. Lighter alternative to Gong.

name: Intercom Fin
description: AI customer support agent built on your help docs. Resolves customer questions automatically with accurate, sourced answers. The best AI support bot available.

name: Zendesk AI
description: AI features built into Zendesk's support platform. Auto-routing, suggested replies, and AI agents. Best for existing Zendesk users wanting to reduce ticket volume.

name: Tidio
description: AI chatbot and live chat for small businesses and e-commerce. Easy to set up, affordable, and effective. The best entry point for AI customer support.

name: Freshdesk (Freddy AI)
description: AI support assistant in Freshworks' help desk. Auto-suggests solutions, summarizes tickets, and helps agents respond faster. Good mid-market alternative to Zendesk AI.
cons: AI less capable than Intercom Fin

name: Ada
description: Enterprise AI customer service platform. Automates support across channels with high accuracy. Used by major brands to resolve millions of conversations.

name: Chatbase
description: Build custom AI chatbots trained on your content. Upload docs, websites, or text and get a ChatGPT-like bot for your business. Simple and effective for basic support.

name: Voiceflow
description: No-code platform for building advanced AI agents and chatbots. More control than Chatbase with visual workflow builder. Great for teams that need custom conversation flows.
pricing: Free tier / Pro $50/mo / Team $125/mo / Enterprise custom

name: Notion
description: All-in-one workspace for notes, docs, wikis, and project management. AI features help write, summarize, and organize. The Swiss Army knife of productivity tools.

name: Beautiful.ai
description: AI presentation tool that enforces good design. Smart templates auto-adjust as you add content. For people who want slides that look professional without design skills.

name: Superhuman
description: AI-powered email client that helps you reach inbox zero. AI writes replies, summarizes threads, and prioritizes messages. Premium email experience for power users.

name: SciSpace
description: AI research assistant that helps you understand academic papers. Upload a paper and ask questions about it. Also finds related papers and extracts data from tables.
pricing: Free tier / Premium $12/mo / Team $8/mo per seat

name: Consensus
description: AI search engine for scientific research. Ask a question and get answers sourced from peer-reviewed papers. Great for evidence-based decision making.

name: Elicit
description: AI research assistant that finds and analyzes academic papers. Extracts key findings, identifies methodology, and synthesizes across papers. Built for serious researchers.

name: ScholarAI
description: AI research tool with access to 200M+ papers. Summarizes papers, finds citations, and helps with literature reviews. Available as a ChatGPT plugin and standalone.

name: Khanmigo
description: Khan Academy's AI tutor. Guides students through problems without giving answers. The best example of AI tutoring done right — teaches thinking, not just answers.
pricing: Free for students / District pricing for schools

name: Semantic Scholar
description: AI-powered academic search by the Allen Institute. TLDR summaries for papers, citation context, and research feeds. Free and essential for any researcher.

name: QuillBot
description: AI paraphrasing and writing assistant. Rewrites text in different styles, checks grammar, and summarizes content. Popular with students and content creators.

name: Photomath
description: AI math solver — point your camera at a problem and get step-by-step solutions. Now owned by Google. The most practical AI tool for math students.

name: GitHub Models
description: Free access to top AI models (GPT-4, Llama, Mistral) directly in GitHub. Test models, compare outputs, and deploy via Azure. The easiest way to experiment with AI models.
pricing: Free tier / Azure pricing for production

name: Hugging Face
description: The GitHub of machine learning. Host models, datasets, and demos. The central hub for the open-source AI community with hundreds of thousands of models.

name: Replicate
description: Run open-source AI models in the cloud with an API. No GPU management needed. Great for developers who want to use models like Llama, Flux, or Whisper without infrastructure hassle.

name: Together AI
description: Fast, affordable inference for open-source models. Run Llama, Mixtral, and other models at scale. Known for speed and competitive pricing in the inference space.

name: Ollama
description: Run large language models locally on your machine. Simple CLI to download and run Llama, Mistral, and dozens of other models. The easiest way to run AI locally.

name: LangChain
description: Framework for building applications with LLMs. Chain together prompts, tools, and data sources. The most popular framework for AI application development.

name: Vercel AI SDK
description: TypeScript toolkit for building AI applications. Streaming, tool calling, and structured output with any LLM provider. The best DX for AI-powered web apps.

name: Pinecone
description: Managed vector database for AI applications. Store and search embeddings for RAG, recommendations, and semantic search. The most popular vector DB for production AI.

name: OpenRouter
description: Unified API for 100+ AI models. One API key to access GPT-4, Claude, Llama, and more. Great for developers who want model flexibility without managing multiple API keys.
